headline: Do Arch Capital’s 2025 Results and Preferred Dividends Reveal a New Capital Strategy for ACGL?
summary: In late February 2026, Arch Capital Group declared quarterly cash dividends on its Series F and Series G non-cumulative preferred shares, payable on 31 March 2026 to holders of record on 15 March 2026, funded from lawfully available resources under Bermuda law. This preferred dividend decision, alongside record 2025 operating income and strong Reinsurance and Mortgage segment performance, highlights management’s focus on balancing growth with consistent capital returns to investors...
